measurement_note: Size is r, the Orders row count. Every legal benchmark row belongs to a different qualifying calendar month, so all rows survive filtering and every monthly group must be emitted. The remotely Accepted grouped query and an independent single-pass group query have an O(r log r) portable upper bound. A correct formulation that derives each month and uses correlated subqueries to rescan Orders for both aggregates performs O(r^2) work, completes every tier, and is rejected only by scaling.
